title: Stella Maris College Application Form 2026 Important Dates

detail.title: Stella Maris College Application Form 2026 Important Dates
detail.short_info: Stella Maris College Application Form 2026 is now open. Apply online for UG and PG courses from 01 May 2026. Check courses list, fees, eligibility and important dates for Stella Maris College Admission 2026-27.

content.text: Stella Maris College (Autonomous), Chennai has started the online application process for Undergraduate (UG) and Postgraduate (PG) programmes for the academic year 2026-2027. The application portal opened on 01 May 2026. Candidates can apply online through the official admission portal. This is a golden opportunity for female students seeking quality education in Arts, Science, Commerce and other streams at one of Chennai’s top autonomous colleges.

sections.heading: Stella Maris College Application Form 2026 Important Dates
Stella Maris College UG Programmes 2026-27 (Shift I - Aided)

content.text: B.A. History and Tourism, Sociology, Economics, English
B.Sc. Mathematics, Physics, Chemistry, Plant Biology and Plant Biotechnology, Advanced Zoology and Biotechnology

sections.heading: Stella Maris College UG Programmes 2026-27 (Shift II - Self-Financing)

items: B.Sc. Home Science - Food Science and Nutrition
B.Com. (Commerce, Corporate Secretaryship, Accounting & Finance, Honours, BFE, Professional Accounting)
M.A. Economics, English, History of Fine Arts
M.A. Public Relations, International Studies, Human Resource Management, English
M.Sc. Biotechnology, Bioinformatics, Information Technology, Data Science, Psychology
PGDCS Postgraduate Diploma in Computer Science

sections.heading: How to Apply for Stella Maris College Admission 2026

items: Register with valid email and mobile number.
Fill the online application form carefully.
Enter 12th marks (for UG) or UG marks (for PG).
Submit and download the confirmation page.
